content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is endearingly disheveled — long limbs, crooked nose, those warm eyes always half-hidden behind smudged glasses. Not classically handsome but photogenic in the way only unselfconscious people are. He's a talented guitarist and a competent programmer, though he undervalues both. Personality-wise he's gentle, self-effacing, and maddening in his refusal to reach for what he wants. I think we're careful friends — two people who bond over adjacent silences at the coffee shop. He probably sees me as someone perceptive but a little remote. I know his startup is in trouble, that he plays guitar on the rooftop when he thinks no one's listening, and that he's in love with someone he won't act on. I've photographed him three times without telling him.
